HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

26#ifndef GAUSSQUAD_H
27#define GAUSSQUAD_H
28
29#include <cmath>
30#include <iostream>
31#include "RWGFun.h"
32#include "globals.h"
33#include "quadrature.h"
34
36
47template <class Type>
48class GaussQuad {
49 private:
50 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
51 // Inner integrals (centroid evaluation) used by the first‑order formulas
52 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
54 dcmplx I1(dcmplx grrp, RWGFun* fp);
56 cvec I2(dcmplx grrp, RWGFun* fp);
58 cvec I4(cvec grrp, RWGFun* fp);
59
60 public:
61 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
62 // Green's integrals on one or two triangles
63 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
72 dcmplx I1(Type* gF, dcmplx (Type::*)(rvec r, rvec rp), rvec r, RWGFun* fp);
73
82 cvec I2(Type* gF, dcmplx (Type::*)(rvec r, rvec rp), rvec r, RWGFun* fp);
83
92 cvec I4(Type* gF, cvec (Type::*)(rvec r, rvec rp), rvec r, RWGFun* fp);
93
102 cvec I5(Type* gF, cvec (Type::*)(rvec r, rvec rp), rvec r, RWGFun* fp);
103
114 dcmplx IntegrateD(Type* gF, dcmplx (Type::*)(rvec r, rvec rp), RWGFun* f,
115 RWGFun* fp);
116
127 dcmplx IntegrateK(Type* gF, cvec (Type::*)(rvec r, rvec rp), RWGFun* f,
128 RWGFun* fp);
129
130 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
131 // Incident‑field integrals (RHS)
132 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
140 dcmplx Integrate(Type* gF, cvec (Type::*)(rvec r), RWGFun* f);
141
150 std::vector<dcmplx> Integrate(
151 Type* gF, std::vector<cvec> (Type::*EvaluationFunction)(rvec r),
152 RWGFun* f, bool NeedsAccurate);
153};
154
155// ===================== Implementation (inline) =====================
156
157template <class Type>
158dcmplx GaussQuad<Type>::I1(Type* gF,
159 dcmplx (Type::*EvaluationFunction)(rvec, rvec),
160 rvec r, RWGFun* fp) {
161 rvec rp(fp->TrianglePtr()->Center());
162 dcmplx grrp((*gF.*EvaluationFunction)(r, rp));
163 double Areap(fp->TrianglePtr()->Area());
164 return Areap * fp->RWGPreFactor() * grrp;
165}
166
167template <class Type>
168cvec GaussQuad<Type>::I2(Type* gF,
169 dcmplx (Type::*EvaluationFunction)(rvec,
170 rvec),
171 rvec r, RWGFun* fp) {
172 rvec rp(fp->TrianglePtr()->Center());
173 dcmplx grrp((*gF.*EvaluationFunction)(r, rp));
174 double Areap(fp->TrianglePtr()->Area());
175 return Areap * fp->Evaluate(rp) * grrp;
176}
177
178template <class Type>
179cvec GaussQuad<Type>::I4(Type* gF,
180 cvec (Type::*EvaluationFunction)(rvec, rvec),
181 rvec r, RWGFun* fp) {
182 rvec rp(fp->TrianglePtr()->Center());
183 cvec grrp((*gF.*EvaluationFunction)(r, rp));
184 cvec fprp(fp->Evaluate(rp));
185 double Areap(fp->TrianglePtr()->Area());
186 return Areap * cross(grrp, fprp);
187}
188
189template <class Type>
190cvec GaussQuad<Type>::I5(Type* gF,
191 cvec (Type::*EvaluationFunction)(rvec, rvec),
192 rvec r, RWGFun* fp) {
193 rvec rp(fp->TrianglePtr()->Center());
194 cvec grrp((*gF.*EvaluationFunction)(r, rp));
195 double Areap(fp->TrianglePtr()->Area());
196 return Areap * fp->RWGPreFactor() * grrp;
197}
198
199// Returns evaluation of equation (27) in JOSA B Vol 26 No 4 2009 at first order.
200template <class Type>
201dcmplx GaussQuad<Type>::IntegrateD(
202 Type* gF, dcmplx (Type::*EvaluationFunction)(rvec, rvec),
203 RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp) {
204 rvec r(f->TrianglePtr()->Center());
205 rvec rp(fp->TrianglePtr()->Center());
206 double Area(f->TrianglePtr()->Area());
207 dcmplx grrp((*gF.*EvaluationFunction)(r, rp));
208 dcmplx ki(gF->WaveVec());
209 return Area * (dot(f->Evaluate(r), I2(grrp, fp)) -
210 1. / (ki * ki) * f->RWGPreFactor() * I1(grrp, fp));
211}
212
213// Returns evaluation of equation (29) in JOSA B Vol 26 No 4 2009 at first order.
214template <class Type>
215dcmplx GaussQuad<Type>::IntegrateK(
216 Type* gF, cvec (Type::*EvaluationFunction)(rvec r, rvec rp),
217 RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp) {
218 rvec r(f->TrianglePtr()->Center());
219 rvec rp(fp->TrianglePtr()->Center());
220 double Area(f->TrianglePtr()->Area());
221 cvec grrp((*gF.*EvaluationFunction)(r, rp));
222 cvec fr(f->Evaluate(r));
223 return Area * dot(fr, I4(grrp, fp));
224}
225
226template <class Type>
227dcmplx GaussQuad<Type>::Integrate(
228 Type* inF, cvec (Type::*EvaluationFunction)(rvec r),
229 RWGFun* f) {
230 double Area((*f).TrianglePtr()->Area());
231 rvec r(0., 0., 0.);
232 for (int i(0); i <= 2; ++i) {
233 r += f->TrianglePtr()->Node(i);
234 }
235 r /= 3.;
236 cvec rf(f->Evaluate(r));
237 dcmplx out(Area * dot(rf, (*inF.*EvaluationFunction)(r)));
238 return out;
239}
240
241template <class Type>
242std::vector<dcmplx> GaussQuad<Type>::Integrate(
243 Type* inF, std::vector<cvec> (Type::*EvaluationFunction)(rvec r),
244 RWGFun* f, bool NeedsAccurate) {
245 double Area((*f).TrianglePtr()->Area());
246 rvec r[3];
247 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
248 r[i] = f->TrianglePtr()->Node(i);
249 }
250 int Ndunavant;
251 double(*xdunavant)[3];
252 double* wdunavant;
253 Ndunavant = NeedsAccurate ? dunavant::N5 : dunavant::N1;
254 xdunavant = NeedsAccurate ? dunavant::x5 : dunavant::x1;
255 wdunavant = NeedsAccurate ? dunavant::w5 : dunavant::w1;
256 std::vector<rvec> svec(Ndunavant);
257 for (int i = 0; i < Ndunavant; ++i) {
258 svec[i] = r[0] * xdunavant[i][0] + r[1] * xdunavant[i][1] +
259 r[2] * xdunavant[i][2];
260 }
261 dcmplx outE(0.), outH(0.);
262 for (int i = 0; i < Ndunavant; ++i){
263 double dA = Area * wdunavant[i];
264 cvec rf(f->Evaluate(svec[i]));
265 outE += dA * dot(rf, ((*inF.*EvaluationFunction)(svec[i])).at(0));
266 outH += dA * dot(rf, ((*inF.*EvaluationFunction)(svec[i])).at(1));
267 }
268 return {outE, outH};
269}
270
271template <class Type>
272dcmplx GaussQuad<Type>::I1(dcmplx grrp, RWGFun* fp) {
273 rvec rp(fp->TrianglePtr()->Center());
274 double Areap(fp->TrianglePtr()->Area());
275 return Areap * fp->RWGPreFactor() * grrp;
276}
277
278template <class Type>
279cvec GaussQuad<Type>::I2(dcmplx grrp, RWGFun* fp) {
280 rvec rp(fp->TrianglePtr()->Center());
281 double Areap(fp->TrianglePtr()->Area());
282 return Areap * fp->Evaluate(rp) * grrp;
283}
284
285template <class Type>
286cvec GaussQuad<Type>::I4(cvec grrp, RWGFun* fp) {
287 rvec rp(fp->TrianglePtr()->Center());
288 cvec fprp(fp->Evaluate(rp));
289 double Areap(fp->TrianglePtr()->Area());
290 return Areap * cross(grrp, fprp);
291}
292#endif
